_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: AST assertion-scanner gate — block tests that can't fail (P1-CR-A)

steps.description: RED-first: write tests/unit/test_assertion_scanner.py covering every detected category (no-assert, tautology in each sub-form, mock-only, broad-raises) with positive + negative cases plus the --baseline allowance, --write-baseline regeneration, and --json shape; run them and capture RED. Then port + extend InnoForge's scripts/check_test_assertions.py. Generate tests/assertion_free_baseline.txt via --write-baseline. Add Makefile `test-assertions` target + fold into `quality:`. Add the `assertions` gate to the canonical list in skills/iw-workflow/SKILL.md (right after `lint`). Add `- run: make test-assertions` to the lint-typecheck job in .github/workflows/test-quality.yml. Add the §8 paragraph + flip §9 row in docs/IW_AI_Core_Testing_Strategy.md. Add the cross-reference line in skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md. Run `iw sync-skills`. Tick item 1.1 DONE + changelog entry in ai-dev/work/TESTS_ENHANCEMENT.md. Record tdd_red_evidence in the result JSON.

Review S01: scanner correctness across all four categories (positive + negative); baseline file format, sortedness, comment header; exit-code semantics (`--strict` vs baseline); Makefile `quality:` rule update; skill-canon update (right position in the gate list, `iw sync-skills` ran — diff .claude/skills/iw-workflow/SKILL.md vs skills/iw-workflow/SKILL.md); GH workflow step (right job, right position); strategy doc §8 + §9 updates; testing-skill cross-reference; plan-doc tick + changelog; no out-of-scope edits.

Global review: scanner <-> unit tests <-> baseline <-> Makefile <-> skill canon <-> GH workflow <-> docs chain is internally consistent; the `assertions` gate is wired into both CI surfaces; .claude/skills/iw-workflow/SKILL.md and .claude/skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md reflect their masters; no scope creep into mutmut/vulture/deptry/cleanup of the existing baseline.
QV: Assertion scanner (the new gate, dogfooded on its own CR)
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
